subject: western wholesale activities - gas & power conf. call

emails.subject: Re: Western Wholesale Activities - Gas & Power Conf. Call
emails.subject_base: Western Wholesale Activities - Gas & Power Conf. Call
emails.body: One caveat on the expedited motion we have to tell them whether we are in or out by 1pm EDT tomorrow. SO, we would not be discussing at in our conference call. I have already recommended internally that we go forward and join Dynegy's motion. So, by the time we have our call tomorrow, the filing will be made already. Sue Mara Enron Corp. Tel: (415) 782-7802 Fax:(415) 782-7854 Ray Alvarez 05/23/2001 02:25 PM

emails.subject: Re: Western Wholesale Activities - Gas & Power Conf. Call
emails.subject_base: Western Wholesale Activities - Gas & Power Conf. Call
emails.body: Correct, I also signed off with Ron Carroll of Bracewell last night. On the call, the filing would be discussed as an informational item for the whole group. Ray Susan J Mara 05/23/2001 06:23 PM
